entries.speaker: aldous
lines: You're looking for the knight.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Edren. Is he—

entries.speaker: aldous
lines: Alive. Sitting. That's about all I can tell you.

entries.speaker: aldous
lines:
I was a knight once. Then I was a coward. Then I was
a monk. Now I'm just a man who makes bread and prays. The order
matters less than you think.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Edren.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Sable. You shouldn't have come.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Yeah, well. Nobody should do a lot of things.

entries.speaker: edren
lines:
I didn't see it. Months of it — the nightmares, the
isolation, the way he stopped looking people in the eye — and I
didn't see it.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: None of us did.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: I'm his commanding officer. His friend. I should have—

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
Should have what? Read his mind? Outthought something
that's been breaking people since before the towers were built?

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
Edren. The world is falling apart. The Wilds are
dying. The Compact is eating itself. Valdris doesn't have a king
anymore. And you're sitting in a monastery feeling sorry about
something that wasn't your fault.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: I can't—

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
You can. I know you can, because I'm here, and I'm
nobody. I'm a thief from the Bellhaven stilts with no money, no
titles, and no plan. And I'm still moving. So if I can do it, you
damn well can.

entries.speaker: aldous
lines:
She's right, you know. You came here to hide, son.
That's allowed. But this place isn't for hiding. It's for
remembering what you're hiding from.

entries.speaker: aldous
lines: That's new.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Edren.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Stay behind me.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Where are the others?

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Scattered. I'm collecting. You're first.
(If Edren is NOT first reunion and `lira_found` set.)

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
Scattered. Lira's with me. She infiltrated the
Compact — found Cael's trail.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: She went back to the Compact? Alone?

entries.speaker: sable
lines: She's not alone anymore. Neither are you.
(If Edren is NOT first reunion and `torren_found` set.)

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
Torren's alive. The Wilds nearly killed him — he
was holding back the corruption by himself. We stabilized the
nexus.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: The nexus held?

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
First clean ley energy since the rupture. The
Pallor can be pushed back. That's what matters.
(If Edren is NOT first reunion and `maren_found` set.)

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
I found Maren. She was in a ruin older than
civilization. She found the pattern — the Pallor has done this
before.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: How many times?

entries.speaker: sable
lines:
Enough times that someone built a library to
track it.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Then we keep moving. I wasted enough time sitting.

entries.speaker: aldous
lines:
Go well, knight. And next time you visit, bring
something to drink. The wine here is terrible.
